properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Flyway native-connectors auto-configuration.

properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.url
properties.description: Flyway native-connector URL (e.g. cassandra://host:port/keyspace, mongodb://host:port/db). Overrides any service-connection-supplied URL.

properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.user
properties.description: Username used to connect to the database.

properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.password
properties.description: Password used to connect to the database.

properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.default-schema
properties.description: Default schema (Cassandra keyspace / MongoDB database) appended to the URL path when the URL itself does not carry one.

properties.name: spring.flyway-nc.migration-suffixes
properties.description: Migration file suffixes Flyway recognizes. Replaces Flyway's defaults rather than adding to them; when empty, Flyway's defaults apply.
